mapper.select: SELECT B.MASTER_KEY, B.MASTER_SEQ, B.ORDER_NO, B.PTN_GROUP, B.PLT_NO, B.BOX_ORDER_QTY, B.BOX_ROBO_QTY, B.REMARKS, B.CASE_NO, B.ROBO_NO, B.ROBO_LINE, C.LN_IPUT_NO, C.PTN_GROUP, C.PART_NO, C.BARCODE, CASE WHEN C.WORK_ID IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS COMPLETE_YN FROM ( SELECT MASTER_KEY, MASTER_SEQ, ORDER_NO, PTN_GROUP, PLT_NO,REMARKS, CASE_NO, SUM(BOX_ORDER_QTY) as BOX_ORDER_QTY, SUM(BOX_ROBO_QTY) as BOX_ROBO_QTY ,ROBO_NO,ROBO_LINE FROM DB_ORDER_PALLET_PART_INFO WHERE REMARKS IS NOT NULL GROUP BY MASTER_KEY,MASTER_SEQ,ORDER_NO ,PTN_GROUP,PLT_NO,REMARKS,CASE_NO,ROBO_NO,ROBO_LINE ) B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT F.MASTER_KEY, F.MASTER_SEQ, F.ORDER_NO, F.PLT_NO, F.LN_IPUT_NO, F.PTN_GROUP, F.PART_NO, F.TICKET_BCD AS BARCODE, D.WORK_ID FROM DB_ORDER_PALLET_BOX_INFO F LEFT JOIN EQ_PLACE_ORDER D ON D.BARCODE = F.TICKET_BCD AND D.CMD_STATUS = '4' ) C ON C.MASTER_KEY = B.MASTER_KEY AND C.MASTER_SEQ = B.MASTER_SEQ AND C.ORDER_NO = B.ORDER_NO AND C.PLT_NO = B.PLT_NO WHERE B.MASTER_KEY = #{masterKey} AND B.MASTER_SEQ = #{masterSeq} AND B.ORDER_NO = #{orderNo} AND B.PLT_NO = #{pltNo}

SELECT A.MASTER_KEY, A.MASTER_SEQ, A.ORDER_NO, A.PTN_GROUP, A.PLT_NO, A.BOX_ORDER_QTY, A.BOX_ROBO_QTY, A.REMARKS, A.CASE_NO, A.ROBO_NO, A.ROBO_LINE, C.LN_IPUT_NO, C.PTN_GROUP, C.PART_NO, C.TICKET_BCD AS BARCODE, CASE WHEN B.CMD_STATUS !='4' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS COMPLETE_YN FROM (SELECT * FROM DB_ORDER_PALLET_PART_INFO WHERE MASTER_KEY = #{masterKey} AND MASTER_SEQ = #{masterSeq} AND ORDER_NO = #{orderNo} AND PLT_NO = #{pltNo}) A JOIN EQ_APM_PLACE_ORDER B ON A.MASTER_KEY = B.MASTER_KEY AND A.MASTER_SEQ = B.MASTER_SEQ AND A.ORDER_NO = B.ORDER_NO AND A.PLT_NO = B.PLT_NO AND B.ORDER_TYPE = 'RECIPE' JOIN DB_ORDER_PALLET_BOX_INFO C ON CONCAT(',', B.RECIPE_SERIAL, ',') LIKE CONCAT('%,', C.SERIAL_NO, ',%')

SELECt B.MASTER_KEY, B.MASTER_SEQ, B.ORDER_NO, B.PTN_GROUP, B.PLT_NO, B.BOX_ORDER_QTY, B.BOX_ROBO_QTY, B.REMARKS, B.CASE_NO, A.ROBO_NO, A.ROBO_LINE, C.LN_IPUT_NO, C.PTN_GROUP, C.PART_NO, C.BARCODE, CASE WHEN C.WORK_ID IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS COMPLETE_YN FROM DB_ROBO_DATA_INFO A JOIN (select MASTER_KEY, MASTER_SEQ, ORDER_NO, PTN_GROUP, PLT_NO, REMARKS, CASE_NO, SUM(BOX_ORDER_QTY) as BOX_ORDER_QTY, SUM(BOX_ROBO_QTY) as BOX_ROBO_QTY FROM DB_ORDER_PALLET_PART_INFO GROUP BY MASTER_KEY, MASTER_SEQ, ORDER_NO, PTN_GROUP, PLT_NO, REMARKS, CASE_NO) B ON A.MASTER_KEY = B.MASTER_KEY AND A.MASTER_SEQ = B.MASTER_SEQ AND A.ORDER_NO = B.ORDER_NO AND A.PLT_NO = B.PLT_NO LEFT JOIN (SELECT F.MASTER_KEY, F.MASTER_SEQ, F.ORDER_NO, F.PLT_NO, F.LN_IPUT_NO, F.PTN_GROUP, F.PART_NO, F.TICKET_BCD AS BARCODE, D.WORK_ID FROM DB_ORDER_PALLET_BOX_INFO F LEFT JOIN EQ_PLACE_ORDER D ON D.BARCODE = F.TICKET_BCD AND D.CMD_STATUS = '4') C ON C.MASTER_KEY = B.MASTER_KEY AND C.MASTER_SEQ = B.MASTER_SEQ AND C.ORDER_NO = B.ORDER_NO AND C.PLT_NO = B.PLT_NO WHERE 3 > A.ROBO_NO
SELECT ROBO_NO,ROBO_LINE,MASTER_KEY,MASTER_SEQ,ORDER_NO,PLT_NO FROM DB_ROBO_DATA_INFO WHERE ROBO_NO = #{roboNo} AND ROBO_LINE = #{roboLine}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EQ_PLACE_ORDER ( WORK_ID, CMD_STATUS, CMD_STATUS_DESC, BARCODE, M_BOX_CD, DEVICE_CODE, CREATE_DATE ) SELECT 'FFFF', -- WORK_ID '4', -- CMD_STATUS N'WCS 완료처리', -- CMD_STATUS_DESC A.TICKET_BCD, -- BARCODE C.M_BOX_CD, -- M_BOX_CD #{deviceCode}, -- DEVICE_CODE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP -- CREATE_DATE FROM DB_ORDER_PALLET_BOX_INFO A LEFT JOIN EQ_PLACE_ORDER B ON A.TICKET_BCD = B.BARCODE JOIN DB_ORDER_PALLET_PART_INFO C ON C.MASTER_KEY = A.MASTER_KEY AND C.MASTER_SEQ = A.MASTER_SEQ AND C.ORDER_NO = A.ORDER_NO AND C.PLT_NO = A.PLT_NO WHERE B.BARCODE IS NULL AND A.MASTER_KEY = #{masterKey} AND A.MASTER_SEQ = #{masterSeq} AND A.ORDER_NO = #{orderNo} AND A.PLT_NO = #{pltNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.WORK_ID, A.PTN_GROUP, A.MASTER_KEY, A.MASTER_SEQ, A.ORDER_NO, A.PLT_NO, PARSEDATETIME( CONCAT( SUBSTRING(CMD_ID, 1, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(CMD_ID, 5, 2), '-', SUBSTRING(CMD_ID, 7, 2), ' ', SUBSTRING(CMD_ID, 9, 2), ':', SUBSTRING(CMD_ID, 11, 2), ':', SUBSTRING(CMD_ID, 13, 2) ), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' ) AS MOD_DTM FROM EQ_APM_PLACE_ORDER A JOIN DB_ORDER_PALLET_PART_INFO B ON A.MASTER_KEY = B.MASTER_KEY AND A.MASTER_SEQ = B.MASTER_SEQ AND A.ORDER_NO = B.ORDER_NO AND A.PLT_NO = B.PLT_NO WHERE A.WORK_ID = #{workId} AND A.ORDER_TYPE = 'PALLET'
UNION ALL
SELECT A.WORK_ID, A.PTN_GROUP, A.MASTER_KEY, A.MASTER_SEQ, A.ORDER_NO, A.PLT_NO, A.MOD_DTM FROM DB_PALLET_LABEL_BUFFER A JOIN DB_ORDER_PALLET_PART_INFO B ON A.MASTER_KEY = B.MASTER_KEY AND A.MASTER_SEQ = B.MASTER_SEQ AND A.ORDER_NO = B.ORDER_NO AND A.PLT_NO = B.PLT_NO WHERE A.WORK_ID = #{workId} ) AS Combined ORDER BY MOD_DTM DESC LIMIT 1
